name: Siglent-Oscilloscope
summary: Python library for Siglent oscilloscope control and automation via SCPI over Ethernet/LAN - supports SDS800XHD, SDS1000X-E, SDS2000X Plus, SDS5000X series. Features programmatic API for waveform capture, measurements, trigger control, and PyQt6 GUI with real-time visualization, FFT analysis, protocol decoding (I2C/SPI/UART), and automated data collection
author: Robin Mumm
